title: Applied Materials Investor Relations
note: Primary source for earnings releases, segment revenue breakdowns, management guidance, and SEC filing index.

title: Applied Materials Corporate Website
note: Product portfolio descriptions, technology roadmap narratives, and press releases on new tool launches and customer partnerships.

title: CompaniesMarketCap – Applied Materials
note: Historical market capitalization series for valuation context and S&P 500 peer benchmarking.

title: The OpenROAD Project
note: Primary reference for the open-source RTL-to-GDS flow used to assess design-layer alternatives; not a replacement for physical fab equipment.

title: Efabless Open Chip Design Platform
note: Community chip design and tape-out platform built on SkyWater 130nm open PDK; illustrates the outer boundary of open-source silicon access.

title: SkyWater Open Process Design Kit (SKY130)
note: Google-sponsored fully open PDK for SkyWater 130nm CMOS; demonstrates open-source access to process parameters while highlighting dependence on proprietary physical fab equipment.
